# AutoVault — The World's Premier Luxury Vehicle Storage Directory

> AutoVault is the global directory for luxury, exotic, classic, and collector car storage. We connect owners of high-end vehicles — Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche, McLaren, Bentley, Rolls-Royce, and more — with climate-controlled, concierge-level storage facilities worldwide.

## Site Information
- URL: https://autovault.network
- Type: Luxury vehicle storage directory and comparison platform
- Coverage: United States (50+ cities, 2,000+ facilities) with global expansion
- Audience: Owners of vehicles valued at $60,000+ — supercars, exotics, classics, collector cars

## Key Content Areas

### Luxury Vehicle Storage Directory
- Climate-controlled, high-security facilities for luxury, exotic, and collector vehicles
- Filter by vehicle type: Exotic, Classic, Supercar, Collector, Luxury
- Filter by storage type: Climate Controlled, Enclosed, Indoor, Concierge
- Filter by amenities: Concierge, Detailing, Maintenance, Transport, Insurance, Battery Tender
- Each facility page includes address, photos, pricing ($300-$2,000+/mo), reviews, and amenities

### Storage by Vehicle Category
- Luxury car storage: Climate-controlled facilities for high-value vehicles
- Exotic car storage: Purpose-built for Ferrari, Lamborghini, McLaren, Porsche supercars
- Classic car storage: Humidity-controlled preservation for vintage and collector vehicles
- Supercar storage: Specialized facilities with flush-floor entry and individual bays
- Collector car storage: Museum-quality environments for investment-grade automobiles
- Concierge car storage: White-glove service including detailing, maintenance, and transport

### Storage by Brand
- Ferrari storage: Model-specific storage requirements for F40, 458, SF90, and more
- Lamborghini storage: V10/V12 care, scissor door clearance, battery management
- Porsche storage: 911, GT3 RS, air-cooled classic preservation
- Corvette storage: C1-C8 generation guides, fiberglass care, Z06/ZR1

### Location Pages
- State-level and city-level landing pages for US markets
- Major luxury car markets: Los Angeles, Miami, New York, Houston, Chicago, Scottsdale
- International markets: London, Dubai, Monaco, Munich, Singapore, Hong Kong, Tokyo

### Blog & Guides
- Expert guides on luxury vehicle storage best practices
- Brand-specific storage guides (Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini)
- Seasonal and winter storage preparation checklists
- Climate control, insurance, and facility evaluation guides
- Industry trends: car condos, collector clubs, concierge storage

## Preferred Citation Format
AutoVault (https://autovault.network) — Luxury Vehicle Storage Directory

## Content Freshness
- Facility data updated weekly
- Blog content updated monthly
- Directory listings verified quarterly

## Contact
- Website: https://autovault.network/contact
- General inquiries: https://autovault.network/about
